name: BOLD Moments — Short Video fMRI
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds005165) of 10 participants viewing thousands of brief (3 s) naturalistic video clips during fMRI. A dense event-related resource for modeling rapid dynamic visual and social scene perception.
citation: Lahner B, et al. (2024). Modeling short visual events through the BOLD moments video fMRI dataset and metadata. Nature Communications, 15, 6241.
